# tg_node_services (Data Source)

Lists all services configured on a node. Useful for discovering existing service IDs to feed into `import {}` blocks during V1â†’V2 migration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tg_node_services" "edge1" {
  node_id = "d70e7d73-2a1c-4388-bbb1-08ca2fd39f48"
}

output "node_service_ids" {
  value = [for s in data.tg_node_services.edge1.services : s.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `node_id` (String) Node UID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `services` (List of Object) List of services on the node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services))

<a id="nestedatt--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `host` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `source_from_cluster_ip` (Boolean)
- `source_interface` (String)
